content.problemStatement:
Chef has an exam in the next NNN hours, and he still has to read MMM pages of a book to be fully prepared for the exam.

Every hour, Chef reads is able to read exactly AAA pages. Will Chef be able to read all MMM pages before the exam? Print Yes\text{Yes}Yes or No\text{No}No accordingly.


Input Format

The first and only line contains 333 integers - NNN, MMM and AAA.


Output Format
Print Yes\text{Yes}Yes if Chef will be able to finish reading all MMM pages, and No\text{No}No otherwise.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Chef will be able to read exactly 2⋅3=62 \cdot 3 = 62⋅3=6 pages in the 222 hours barely finishing in time.

Explanation:
Chef will be able to read only 666 pages, falling short of the required 777 pages.
